acceptance_targets: [chapter_09-F004] PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:192, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507, no more than one sentence keeps the exact "She wanted to" opening and the emotional escalation remains legible; FAIL if the repeated opening still dominates both moments.

[chapter_09-F005] PASS if the revised sentence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:355 preserves Nora's legal-language escalation while eliminating explicit diagnostic label language; FAIL if the narration still names the pattern as a meta tag.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:192, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507, no more than one sentence keeps the exact "She wanted to" opening and the emotional escalation remains legible; FAIL if the repeated opening still dominates both moments.
findings.problem: Recurring prose tic: the repeated "She wanted to ..." construction appears more than twice at climactic stress points, flattening cadence and signaling autopilot repetition.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the impulse-rendering syntax at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:192, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:507 by converting at least two of the repeated desire clauses into concrete action, sensory perception, or free-indirect thought with different sentence architecture.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised sentence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:355 preserves Nora's legal-language escalation while eliminating explicit diagnostic label language; FAIL if the narration still names the pattern as a meta tag.
findings.problem: Checklist-like meta phrasing ("Legal nouns first, Marisol thought. Stress tell.") over-literalizes character calibration and briefly breaks diegetic immersion.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:355 to show Nora's stress pattern through observable diction and Marisol's embodied recognition without explicit analytic labeling (remove the direct label "Stress tell").

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
